aiAgents.title: AI & Agents
aiAgents.description: Manage AI-powered features, Linear Agent capabilities, and integrations with third-party agents.

planGate.description: AI credits and usage tracking are available on the Business plan. Upgrade to access consumption dashboards, credit top-ups, and per-team spend limits.

agent.enabledDesc: Allow Linear Agent to act on issues, write code, and run automations on behalf of your team.

capabilities.agentAutomationsDesc: Let the agent automatically triage, assign, and update issues based on configured rules.
capabilities.codeIntelligenceDesc: Analyze your codebase to surface relevant context when working on issues.
capabilities.triageIntelligenceDesc: Automatically categorize and prioritize incoming issues using AI.

integrations.availabilityNote: Agent integrations are rolled out progressively. Some integrations may not yet be available for your workspace.

installedAgents.emptyDesc: Connect third-party agents to automate workflows directly from Linear. Find available agents in the integrations directory.

threadSummaries.title: AI resolved thread summaries
threadSummaries.desc: Automatically generate a summary when an issue thread is resolved by the AI agent.
